mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TW_VACCIN (HOSP_CD, VACCIN_YEAR, VACCIN_TYPE, VACCIN_NM, TARGET_CNT, COMPLETE_CNT, VACCIN_DT, REMARK, REG_ID, REG_DT) VALUES (#{hospCd}, #{vaccinYear}, #{vaccinType}, #{vaccinNm}, #{targetCnt}, #{completeCnt}, #{vaccinDt}, #{remark}, #{regId}, NOW())

INSERT INTO TW_RESTRAINT (HOSP_CD, PAT_CD, RESTRAINT_TYPE, RESTRAINT_REASON, START_DT, END_DT, ORDER_DR, NURSE_NM, REMARK, REG_ID, REG_DT) VALUES (#{hospCd}, #{patCd}, #{restraintType}, #{restraintReason}, #{startDt}, #{endDt}, #{orderDr}, #{nurseNm}, #{remark}, #{regId}, NOW())

INSERT INTO TW_FIRE_EQUIP (HOSP_CD, CHK_YEAR, BUILDING, LOCATION, EQUIP_TYPE, EQUIP_NM, INSTALL_DT, CHK_DT, CHK_RESULT, REMARK, REG_ID, REG_DT) VALUES (#{hospCd}, #{chkYear}, #{building}, #{location}, #{equipType}, #{equipNm}, #{installDt}, #{chkDt}, #{chkResult}, #{remark}, #{regId}, NOW())

INSERT INTO TW_STAFF_EDU (HOSP_CD, EDU_YEAR, EDU_TYPE, EDU_NM, EDU_DT, EDU_TIME, INSTRUCTOR, EDU_PLACE, TARGET_CNT, ATTEND_CNT, REMARK, REG_ID, REG_DT) VALUES (#{hospCd}, #{eduYear}, #{eduType}, #{eduNm}, #{eduDt}, #{eduTime}, #{instructor}, #{eduPlace}, #{targetCnt}, #{attendCnt}, #{remark}, #{regId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TW_STAFF_EDU_ATT WHERE EDU_ID = #{eduId} ORDER BY ATT_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TW_STAFF_EDU_ATT (EDU_ID, EMP_CD, EMP_NM, DEPT_NM, ATTEND_YN, REMARK, REG_ID, REG_DT) VALUES (#{eduId}, #{empCd}, #{empNm}, #{deptNm}, #{attendYn}, #{remark}, #{regId}, NOW())

INSERT INTO TW_HEALTH_CHK (HOSP_CD, CHK_YEAR, EMP_CD, EMP_NM, DEPT_NM, CHK_DT, CHK_TYPE, CHK_RESULT, REMARK, REG_ID, REG_DT) VALUES (#{hospCd}, #{chkYear}, #{empCd}, #{empNm}, #{deptNm}, #{chkDt}, #{chkType}, #{chkResult}, #{remark}, #{regId}, NOW())

INSERT INTO TW_MED_DEVICE (HOSP_CD, CATEGORY, DEVICE_NM, MODEL_NM, SERIAL_NO, DEVICE_STATUS, PURCHASE_DT, INSTALL_LOCATION, CHK_CYCLE, LAST_CHK_DT, NEXT_CHK_DT, REMARK, REG_ID, REG_DT) VALUES (#{hospCd}, #{category}, #{deviceNm}, #{modelNm}, #{serialNo}, #{deviceStatus}, #{purchaseDt}, #{installLocation}, #{chkCycle}, #{lastChkDt}, #{nextChkDt}, #{remark}, #{regId}, NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM TW_STAFF_DUTY
HOSP_CD = #{hospCd}
AND WORK_DT LIKE CONCAT(#{workDt}, '%')
ORDER BY WORK_DT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TW_STAFF_DUTY (HOSP_CD, WORK_DT, EMP_CD, EMP_NM, DEPT_NM, DUTY_TYPE, SHIFT_NM, START_TIME, END_TIME, REMARK, REG_ID, REG_DT) VALUES (#{hospCd}, #{workDt}, #{empCd}, #{empNm}, #{deptNm}, #{dutyType}, #{shiftNm}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{remark}, #{regId}, NOW())

INSERT INTO TW_MEAL_ROUND (HOSP_CD, ROUND_DT, ROUND_TIME, INSPECTOR, WARD_NM, MEAL_TYPE, TEMP_CHK, HYGIENE_CHK, TASTE_CHK, REMARK, REG_ID, REG_DT) VALUES (#{hospCd}, #{roundDt}, #{roundTime}, #{inspector}, #{wardNm}, #{mealType}, #{tempChk}, #{hygieneChk}, #{tasteChk}, #{remark}, #{regId}, NOW())

INSERT INTO TW_DRUG_MANAGE (HOSP_CD, DRUG_TYPE, DRUG_CD, DRUG_NM, UNIT, STOCK_QTY, SAFE_QTY, STORAGE_LOCATION, EXPIRY_DT, REMARK, REG_ID, REG_DT) VALUES (#{hospCd}, #{drugType}, #{drugCd}, #{drugNm}, #{unit}, #{stockQty}, #{safeQty}, #{storageLocation}, #{expiryDt}, #{remark}, #{regId}, NOW())

INSERT INTO TW_INFECTION (HOSP_CD, INFECT_DT, INFECT_TYPE, PAT_CD, PAT_NM, WARD_NM, SYMPTOM, ACTION_TAKEN, RESULT, REMARK, REG_ID, REG_DT) VALUES (#{hospCd}, #{infectDt}, #{infectType}, #{patCd}, #{patNm}, #{wardNm}, #{symptom}, #{actionTaken}, #{result}, #{remark}, #{regId}, NOW())

INSERT INTO TW_HAND_HYGIENE (HOSP_CD, MONITOR_MONTH, WARD_NM, MONITOR_DT, OBSERVER, OBSERVE_CNT, COMPLY_CNT, COMPLY_RATE, REMARK, REG_ID, REG_DT) VALUES (#{hospCd}, #{monitorMonth}, #{wardNm}, #{monitorDt}, #{observer}, #{observeCnt}, #{complyCnt}, #{complyRate}, #{remark}, #{regId}, NOW())
